summary: Decent audience cassette capture with modest fidelity; no specific musical highlights noted
review: The recording is a two‑mic cassette tape captured on a TEAC PC‑10 with Dolby B and TDK SA‑C90 cassettes, yielding a fair‑quality sound that shows the limitations of analog tape. Reviewers did not comment on the performance itself beyond a brief expression of gratitude, so no standout songs or band moments can be identified.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two short reviews; one gives a neutral technical rating (3 stars) and the other is simply appreciative without detail, leaving both show and recording quality uncertain.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded on TEAC PC‑10 cassette deck with Dolby B, TDK SA‑C90 tapes, using two Sony ECM‑280 microphones; typical tape hiss and limited clarity expected.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or performance quality were provided.
